text: disk: 118.9mm round, 8mm thick, center opening 23.8mm diameter, bolt circle: 8x M5, 83.2mm PCD
code:
from build123d import *

od = 118.9
thickness = 8
bore_dia = 23.8
bolt_dia = 5.5
bolt_pcd = 83.2
dowel_dia = 6
dowel_pcd = 71.3


with BuildPart() as part:
    Cylinder(od / 2, thickness)

    Hole(bore_dia / 2)

    with PolarLocations(bolt_pcd / 2, 8, 0):
        Hole(bolt_dia / 2)

    with PolarLocations(dowel_pcd / 2, 2, 0):
        CounterBoreHole(dowel_dia / 2, counter_bore_radius=dowel_dia / 2, counter_bore_depth=4.8)


export_step(part.part, "gearbox_cover.step")

        Hole(bolt_dia / 2)

    with PolarLocations(bolt_pcd / 2, 6, 0):
        Hole(bolt_dia / 2)

    with PolarLocations(dowel_pcd / 2, 2, 0):
        CounterBoreHole(dowel_dia / 2, counter_bore_radius=dowel_dia / 2, counter_bore_depth=3.6)

text: 209.7 mm mild steel round plate, thickness 8mm, center bore 41.9mm, bolt circle: 6x M6, 167.8mm PCD
code:
from build123d import *

od = 209.7
thickness = 8
bore_dia = 41.9
bolt_dia = 6.6
bolt_pcd = 167.8
dowel_dia = 4
dowel_pcd = 104.8


with BuildPart() as part:
    Cylinder(od / 2, thickness)

    Hole(bore_dia / 2)

    with PolarLocations(bolt_pcd / 2, 6, 0):
        Hole(bolt_dia / 2)

    with PolarLocations(dowel_pcd / 2, 2, 0):
        CounterBoreHole(dowel_dia / 2, counter_bore_radius=dowel_dia / 2, counter_bore_depth=4.8)


export_step(part.part, "gearbox_cover.step")

from build123d import *

width = 198.6
height = 147.1
thickness = 12

    Box(width, height, thickness)

        Hole(outer_bolt_dia / 2)
